name: Doll shop or madhouse/hospital?
description:
It is cold and dark hereIt's cold here, it's scary dark. There are strange sounds. Do you dare to come?The strangest doll shop in 2050, why is it famous? This is a secret.

Oh, don't forget to take the medicine. Say hello to your new slave.😈

He will not hesitate to commit suicide or kill you.
creator: @Yami
